codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly handles unrestricted company scope for ATS lanes in ats_only and browser_plus_ats presets. Uses same [{ name: '' }] fallback pattern as grounded_web, ensuring ATS lanes attempt execution with empty company placeholder. Post-loop logic ensures ATS sources appear in sourceSummary with attribution warnings even when no boards found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The pattern of using [{ name: '' }] as an empty company placeholder for unrestricted scope is used in both grounded_web and now ATS lanes. This is a consistent pattern but is not explicitly documented anywhere - it evolved organically from the grounded_web implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: run-discovery.ts:188-195 (ATS fallback) mirrors grounded_web.ts behavior where the same empty placeholder pattern was implemented for VAL-ROUTE-007

sharedStateObservations.observation: The discovery-integration-worker SKILL.md was not found at the expected path, so I could not verify if the worker followed the documented procedure. This should be verified.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. VAL-ROUTE-008 and VAL-ROUTE-009 are correctly implemented with appropriate fallback handling for empty company scope in ATS lanes. All 141 tests pass. The implementation uses a consistent pattern with grounded_web unrestricted scope handling.
